mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_record (medical_order_id, pet_id, doctor_name, chief_complaint, physical_exam, diagnosis, medical_advice, medication, remark, visit_time) VALUES (#{medicalOrderId}, #{petId}, #{doctorName}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{physicalExam}, #{diagnosis}, #{medicalAdvice}, #{medication}, #{remark}, #{visitTime})
mapper.select: SELECT mr.id, mr.medical_order_id, mr.pet_id, mr.doctor_name, mr.chief_complaint, mr.physical_exam, mr.diagnosis, mr.medical_advice, mr.medication, mr.remark, mr.visit_time, mr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name, u.username AS owner_name, dept.name AS department_name FROM medical_record mr LEFT JOIN pet ON mr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN medical_order mo ON mr.medical_order_id = mo.id LEFT JOIN department dept ON mo.department_id = dept.id WHERE mr.id = #{id}

SELECT mr.id, mr.medical_order_id, mr.pet_id, mr.doctor_name, mr.chief_complaint, mr.physical_exam, mr.diagnosis, mr.medical_advice, mr.medication, mr.remark, mr.visit_time, mr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name, u.username AS owner_name, dept.name AS department_name FROM medical_record mr LEFT JOIN pet ON mr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN medical_order mo ON mr.medical_order_id = mo.id LEFT JOIN department dept ON mo.department_id = dept.id WHERE mr.medical_order_id = #{medicalOrderId}

SELECT mr.id, mr.medical_order_id, mr.pet_id, mr.doctor_name, mr.chief_complaint, mr.physical_exam, mr.diagnosis, mr.medical_advice, mr.medication, mr.remark, mr.visit_time, mr.create_time, pet.name AS pet_name, u.username AS owner_name, dept.name AS department_name FROM medical_record mr LEFT JOIN pet ON mr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN medical_order mo ON mr.medical_order_id = mo.id LEFT JOIN department dept ON mo.department_id = dept.id WHERE mr.pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medical_record mr LEFT JOIN pet ON mr.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pet.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN medical_order mo ON mr.medical_order_id = mo.id LEFT JOIN department dept ON mo.department_id = dept.id
AND (pet.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR mr.doctor_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR mr.diagnosis LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
